title1: Thermal & Pressure Solutions for Heavy Industry
desc1: We provide high-performance pressure vessel systems and heat exchangers for multinational corporations and large-scale factories in Vietnam.
desc2: LPG storage tanks, pressure vessels, and chemical tanks are meticulously engineered to meet the most stringent safety standards in the oil & gas and chemical industries.
desc3: Boiler and heat exchanger solutions help save up to 20% in energy costs for textile, food processing, and paper factories.
serviceContent: With modern production lines and a team of highly experienced engineers, we are committed to delivering products that meet the most stringent quality standards.
desc_service_1: Design and fabrication of ASME-standard pressure vessels, ensuring absolute safety for compressed air, LPG, and chemical systems.
desc_service_2: Thermal optimization solutions for paper, food processing, and textile factories with superior heat transfer efficiency.
desc_service_3: Construction of high-pressure piping systems and sanitary piping for pharmaceutical and beverage factories.
desc_service_4: Inspection, periodic maintenance, and technology upgrades for existing thermal and pressure systems.
product_desc: A portfolio of pressure and thermal equipment trusted by leading factories in Hiệp Phước, Amata, and VSIP industrial zones.
